retry_reason: Not a wrapper — no refcount get/put/set operation is the primary purpose.

judge.reason: Primary purpose is device probe/initialization: allocating bridge, getting clocks/resets, registering MIPI host, enabling runtime PM. The only refcount operation is an incidental call to devm_reset_control_get_optional_exclusive (which internally acquires a reset control reference), but this is part of standard driver resource management and not the function's main purpose. The function does not have a focused refcount management role.
